mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sticker_print_order_detail (id, order_id, article_no, article_name, size_code, size_name, size_group, ean13, brand_name, price, print_qty, sort) VALUES
(#{d.id}, #{d.orderId}, #{d.articleNo}, #{d.articleName}, #{d.sizeCode}, #{d.sizeName}, #{d.sizeGroup}, #{d.ean13}, #{d.brandName}, #{d.price}, #{d.printQty}, #{d.sort})
